zh.lifeSummary: 當Margred ferch Madog於大約1460年出生在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利時，她的父親Jenkin ap Gruffudd28歲，母親Susanna Gwynedd24歲。她和Syr Gruffudd ap Hywel至少有4個兒子。

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: German: occupational name for a ferryman, Middle High German verje, verge.

nameMeanings.name: Madog
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Madore
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Eusebe, Fernand, Lucien, Normand, Adhemar, Adrien, Donat, Elzear, Francois, Gaetan, Gilles.
French Canadian: from a French shortened form of the Spanish personal name Amador, from Latin Amator (from amator ‘lover’), a Christian saint's name. Compare Mador .
In some cases possibly also Breton (Madoré): nickname meaning literally ‘good help’, from Old Breton mat ‘good’ and uuoret ‘help’.

nameMeanings.name: Margred
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.description: Charles I of Spain became Emperor Charles V of the Holy Roman Empire.

en.lifeSummary: When Margred ferch Madog was born about 1460, in Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Jenkin ap Gruffudd, was 28 and her mother, Susanna Gwynedd, was 24. She had at least 4 sons with Syr Gruffudd ap Hywel.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margred ferch Madog è nata il circa 1460 nel Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Jenkin ap Gruffudd, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Susanna Gwynedd, aveva 24 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli con Syr Gruffudd ap Hywel.

ja.lifeSummary: Margred ferch Madogが約1460年にイギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアモントゴメリーで生まれた時，父Jenkin ap Gruffuddは28歳，母Susanna Gwyneddは24歳であった。彼女はSyr Gruffudd ap Hywelとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Margred ferch Madog(이)가 대략 1460년 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르 몽고메리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jenkin ap Gruffudd(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Susanna Gwynedd(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 Syr Gruffudd ap Hywel(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margred ferch Madog родилась около 1460 г. в местности монтгомири, монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Jenkin ap Gruffudd было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Susanna Gwynedd, 24. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына от Syr Gruffudd ap Hywel.
